import React, { useState } from "react"; import { FiSettings, FiBell, FiLock, FiUser, FiGlobe, FiMoon, } from "react-icons/fi"; const Settings = () => { const [settings, setSettings] = useState({ notifications: true, darkMode: false, autoSave: true, twoFactor: true, language: "English", username: "Admin User", email: "admin@example.com", }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, type, checked, value } = e.target; setSettings((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: type === "checkbox" ? checked : value, })); }; const handleSave = () => { alert("Settings saved successfully!"); }; return (
